posting.sourceTitle: Roofing Industry JATC of Rochester Local #22
posting.sponsorName: JATC for the Roofing Industry of Rochester, Local Union #22
posting.locationSummary: Rochester, NY area; jurisdiction includes Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Wayne, and Yates counties
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at the JATC office in Rochester during the recruitment period, Monday through Friday from 9:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m., or by appointment.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: JATC for the Roofing Industry of Rochester, Local Union #22, 280 Metro Park, Rochester, NY 14623
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, by appointment; excluding legal holidays
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of JATC for the Roofing Industry of Rochester, Local Union #22, including Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Wayne, and/or Yates counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: May be required to pass a drug screening, at the sponsor's expense, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to travel to required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must attest in writing that they are physically capable of performing the work of the Roofer, including repetitive heavy lifting, kneeling, squatting, and walking.
Must be able to climb and work off ladders and scaffolds.
Must be able to work from high heights, which may require wearing safety protective equipment.
Must be able to work in extreme temperatures and severe weather conditions, including extreme cold and heat.
Must be able to work while wearing respirators.

Must sign a statement indicating they are residents within the jurisdiction of JATC for the Roofing Industry of Rochester, Local Union #22, including Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Wayne, and/or Yates counties.
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must be legally authorized to work in the USA.
May be required to pass a drug screening, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, legally authorized to work in the U.S., live in the sponsor’s jurisdiction, have reliable transportation, and be able to perform physically demanding roofing work. Drug screening may be required after selection.
posting.contactName: JATC for the Roofing Industry of Rochester, Local Union #22
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact JATC for the Roofing Industry of Rochester, Local Union #22 at (585) 235-3098.
